ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset for which the data is recorded */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset on the trade date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset on the trade date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the trade date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the trade date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades for the asset on the trade date */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "adjusted_closing_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid out on the trade date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio if a stock split occurred on the trade date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., stock name) */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the asset */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) number for the asset */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the asset belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry within the sector */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the asset is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy's approach */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the strategy, stored as a JSON string */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the strategy */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics in JSON format */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the strategy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executed trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being traded */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strategy used for the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of the asset traded */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss generated from the trade */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission fee charged for the trade */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during the access (e.g., view, execute trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
